title: vicia biennis
intro: Vicia biennis, also known as the annual vetch or winter vetch, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Vicia biennis include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as its use as a diuretic to treat urinary problems. The herbal preparations of Vicia biennis include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions that can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
